name: Wave
description: Wave is a free accounting and invoicing platform for small businesses. It provides a GraphQL API to manage businesses, customers, invoices, products, accounts, sales taxes, and financial transactions. All operations use POST requests to the /graphql endpoint.

capabilities.name: user_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve the authenticated user's profile information.

capabilities.name: businesses_list
capabilities.description: List all businesses associated with the authenticated user's Wave account.

capabilities.name: business_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve detailed information about a specific business.

capabilities.name: customers_list
capabilities.description: List all customers for a specific business.

capabilities.name: customers_create
capabilities.description: Create a new customer record for a business.

capabilities.name: customers_update
capabilities.description: Update an existing customer's information.

capabilities.name: customers_delete
capabilities.description: Delete a customer record.

capabilities.name: invoices_list
capabilities.description: List all invoices for a business with optional status filtering.

capabilities.name: invoices_create
capabilities.description: Create a new invoice for a customer with line items.

capabilities.name: invoices_send
capabilities.description: Send an invoice to the customer via email.

capabilities.name: invoices_approve
capabilities.description: Approve a draft invoice, making it ready to send.

capabilities.name: invoices_delete
capabilities.description: Delete an invoice.

capabilities.name: invoices_clone
capabilities.description: Duplicate an existing invoice.

capabilities.name: invoices_mark_sent
capabilities.description: Mark an invoice as sent without sending an email.

capabilities.name: products_list
capabilities.description: List all products and services for a business.

capabilities.name: products_create
capabilities.description: Create a new product or service for a business.

capabilities.name: products_update
capabilities.description: Update a product or service.

capabilities.name: products_archive
capabilities.description: Archive a product or service.

capabilities.name: accounts_list
capabilities.description: Retrieve the chart of accounts for a business.

capabilities.name: accounts_create
capabilities.description: Create a new account in the chart of accounts.

capabilities.name: accounts_update
capabilities.description: Update an existing account.

capabilities.name: accounts_archive
capabilities.description: Archive an account.

capabilities.name: sales_taxes_list
capabilities.description: List all sales taxes for a business.

capabilities.name: sales_taxes_create
capabilities.description: Create a new sales tax for a business.

capabilities.name: transactions_create
capabilities.description: Record a financial transaction (income or expense).

capabilities.name: countries_list
capabilities.description: List all countries available in Wave.

capabilities.name: currencies_list
capabilities.description: List all supported currencies.

capabilities.name: account_types_list
capabilities.description: List all available account types.

capabilities.name: account_subtypes_list
capabilities.description: List all available account subtypes.
